title: Import Participants
description: Bulk-upload staff, guests, or election committee members from a CSV or Excel file.

upload.title: Upload File
upload.drag_hint: Drop file here or click to select
upload.formats_hint: CSV, XLSX or XLS — up to 10 MB

preview.title: Preview — {total} rows ({valid} valid, {invalid} invalid)
preview.no_errors: All rows valid — ready to import.

fix_hints.heading: How to fix common issues:
items: "User does not exist" — Invite the person first via Organisation → Members → Invite, or ask them to register.
"Invalid participant_type" — Use exactly: staff, guest, or election_committee.
"Invalid date format" — Use YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. 2025-12-31). Must be a future date.
"Invalid JSON" — Use format like {"view":true} with double quotes.

error.label: Error:
error.invalid_format: Invalid file format. Please upload a CSV or Excel file.

info_panel.title: File Format
columns: email (required) — must be a registered user
checklist: All emails must belong to registered platform users.
To add new users, invite them first via Organisation → Members → Invite.
Staff and Election Committee should already be org members.
Guests can be added without prior membership (temporary access).
info_panel.note: The email address must already exist as a registered platform account.
